title: Quantitative Reasoning, Estimation, and Problem Framing · Decision Notebook: Estimation
summary: Estimate attendance, supplies, time, and uncertainty for a neighborhood event before exact values are available. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg estimation increment in a transparent event-planning estimate notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Estimate magnitudes with benchmarks and defend an appropriate tolerance before calculating exactly.
Interpret a number together with its unit, reference population, time window, and practical meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
